---
title: "Haushalte" 
filters: [remove_title.lua]
anchor-sections: false
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

{{< include src/config.qmd >}}
{{< include src/utils.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
// echo: false
// warning: false
import {vl} from "@vega/vega-lite-api-v5" // apiVersion = '5.6.0' vlVersion = '5.6.0' vegaVersion = '5.23.0' tooltipVersion = '0.30.0'
import {aq, op} from '@uwdata/arquero' // version "6.0.0"
```

<!-- HH fragments @Stefan @Lydia -->

```{ojs}
binsRaw = FileAttachment("data/bins.csv").csv({ typed: true })
scenarios = aq.from(binsRaw)
  .derive({ variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " ") })
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable != "Status quo"))
  .select("variable")
  .dedupe()
  .array("variable")
```

```{ojs}
hhIncomeRaw = FileAttachment("data/household_income_detail.csv").csv({ typed: true })
hhPovertyRaw = FileAttachment("data/household_arop_detail.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}

hhIncome = aq.from(hhIncomeRaw)
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable != "azr0" && d.variable != "azr1"))
  .derive({ 
    value: d=> d.variable != "Status quo" ? d.value / 100 : d.value,
    selectMark: aq.escape(d=> d.variable == select ? "yes" : "no"), 
    })
  .objects()
  
groups = aq.from(hhIncome)
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.group != "Gesamt"))
  .select("group")
  .dedupe()
  .array("group")


hhPoverty = aq.from(hhPovertyRaw)
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable != "azr0" && d.variable != "azr1"))
  .derive({ 
    value: d=> d.variable == "Status quo" ? d.value / 100 : d.value,
    selectMark: aq.escape(d=> d.variable == select ? "yes" : "no"), 
    })
  .objects()
  
hhPoverty
hhIncome
```


::: {.columns .column-body .mainText}
#### RECHNER
# Szenarien von Pensionsreformen im Überblick
Die Szenarien haben außerdem einen Einfluss auf die Haushaltseinkommen und die Armutsquote. Wählen Sie ein Szenario aus um zu sehen welche Gruppen von bestimmten Szenarien am stärksten profitieren.
:::

::: {.columns .column-body .mainText}
```{ojs}
viewof select = Inputs.select(scenarios) // {value: ""} does not work
```
:::

::: {.columns .column-body .separator}
----------------------------------------
:::


:::: {#slideshow-container .column-body}
<button id="prevBtn" class="btn btn-secondary">zurück</button>
<button id="nextBtn" class="btn btn-secondary">weiter</button>

::::

::: {.slide .slide-active}
### Geschlecht

#### Äquivalisiertes Haushaltseinkommen

```{ojs}
barsIncomeG = {

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: "+.1%",  // Format for y-axis labels as percentages
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 5,  // Adjusted padding
          labelLimit: 100,  // Adjusted label limit
          labelFontSize: 12,
        }), 
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 12,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          format: "+.1%"  // Ensure format is set here for text
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format("+.1%"),  // Format the text as percentages
    )

  // Log filtered data for debugging
  let filteredIncome = hhIncome.filter(d => d.group == "Geschlecht" && d.variable == select);
  console.log(filteredIncome);

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width))
    .data(filteredIncome)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config)
    .render();  // Render the chart
}

```

#### Armutsgefährdungsquote

```{ojs}
barsPovertyG = {

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: "+.1f",  // Format for y-axis labels as percentages
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 5,  // Adjusted padding
          labelLimit: 100,  // Adjusted label limit
          labelFontSize: 12,
        }), 
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 12,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          format: "+.1f"  // Ensure format is set here for text
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(".1f")  // Format the text as fixed-point with one decimal
    )
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("datum.value >= 0 ? '+' + format(datum.value, '.1f') + ' PP.' : format(datum.value, '.1f') + ' PP.'")
        .as("formattedValue")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.text()
        .fieldN("formattedValue")  // Use the calculated field for text labels
    );
    
  // Log filtered data for debugging
  let filteredPoverty = hhPoverty.filter(d => d.group == "Geschlecht" && d.variable == select);
  console.log(filteredPoverty);

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width))
    .data(filteredPoverty)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config)
    .render();  // Render the chart
}

```

:::

::: {.slide}
### Altersgruppen

#### Äquivalisiertes Haushaltseinkommen

```{ojs}
barsIncomeA = {

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: "+.1%",  // Format for y-axis labels as percentages
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 5,  // Adjusted padding
          labelLimit: 100,  // Adjusted label limit
          labelFontSize: 12,
        }), 
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 12,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          format: "+.1%"  // Ensure format is set here for text
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format("+.1%"),  // Format the text as percentages
    )

  // Log filtered data for debugging
  let filteredIncome = hhIncome.filter(d => d.group == "Altersgruppen" && d.variable == select);
  console.log(filteredIncome);

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width))
    .data(filteredIncome)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config)
    .render();  // Render the chart
}

```

#### Armutsgefährdungsquote

```{ojs}
barsPovertyA = {

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: "+.1f",  // Format for y-axis labels as percentages
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 5,  // Adjusted padding
          labelLimit: 100,  // Adjusted label limit
          labelFontSize: 12,
        }), 
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 12,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          format: "+.1f"  // Ensure format is set here for text
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(".1f")  // Format the text as fixed-point with one decimal
    )
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("datum.value >= 0 ? '+' + format(datum.value, '.1f') + ' PP.' : format(datum.value, '.1f') + ' PP.'")
        .as("formattedValue")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.text()
        .fieldN("formattedValue")  // Use the calculated field for text labels
    );
    
  // Log filtered data for debugging
  let filteredPoverty = hhPoverty.filter(d => d.group == "Altersgruppen" && d.variable == select);
  console.log(filteredPoverty);

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width))
    .data(filteredPoverty)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config)
    .render();  // Render the chart
}

```

:::


<!-- ::: {.columns .column-body .mainText}
Die Szenarien haben außerdem einen Einfluss auf die Haushaltseinkommen und die Armutsquote. Wählen Sie eine Gruppe aus.
::: -->

<!-- :::: {.columns .column-body .menu}
::: {.column width="100%"}
```{ojs}
viewof selectOutcome = Inputs.select(["Haushaltseinkommen", "Armutsquote"], {label: "Outcome", value: "Haushaltseinkommen"})
viewof selectGroup = Inputs.select(groups, {label: "Gruppe", value: "Erwerbsstatus"})
infoPoverty = "Die relative Armutsquote misst den Anteil der Menschen in einer Gesellschaft, deren Einkommen unterhalb einer bestimmten Grenze liegt. Diese Grenze wird in der Regel bei 60 % des mittleren (Median-) Einkommens der Bevölkerung festgelegt. Menschen, die weniger als diesen Betrag verdienen, gelten als relativ arm, da sie im Vergleich zum Durchschnitt deutlich weniger Mittel zur Verfügung haben."
infoIncome = "Das äquivalente Haushaltseinkommen ist ein Maß zur Ermittlung des Einkommensniveaus eines Haushalts unter Berücksichtigung der Haushaltsgröße und -zusammensetzung. Es zielt darauf ab, das verfügbare Einkommen eines Haushalts auf eine einheitliche Basis zu bringen, um Vergleiche zwischen verschiedenen Haushalten zu ermöglichen."
```
:::
::::

::: {.column-margin  .infoText}
![](img/Infobox_info_icon.svg){height=14px} 
${selectOutcome == "Armutsquote" ? infoPoverty : infoIncome}
:::

::: {.columns .column-body .separator}
----------------------------------------
:::

:::: {.columns .column-body }
<button 
  class="btn btn-secondary" 
  type="button" 
  data-bs-toggle="collapse" 
  data-bs-target="#collapseContent5" 
  aria-expanded="false" 
  aria-controls="collapseContent5"
>
  Einfluss auf die Haushaltseinkommen
</button>

::: {.panel .collapse #collapseContent5}
${selectOutcome == "Armutsquote" ? "Armutsquote" : "Äquivalente Haushaltseinkommen"}  im Status quo
```{ojs}
barsIncome = {

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          orient: width > 1200 ? "right" : "top",
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "center",
          labelPadding: 125,
          labelLimit: 111111,
          labelFontSize: 12,
        }), 
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 12,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .value(0),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(",.0f"),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width)/5)
    .data(hhIncome.filter(d => d.group == selectGroup && d.variable == "Status quo"))
    .config(config)
}
```
```{ojs}
barsPoverty = {

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    })
    .encode( 
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          orient: width > 1200 ? "right" : "top", 
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "center",
          labelPadding: 125,
          labelLimit: 111111,
          labelFontSize: 12,
        }), 
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 12,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .value(0),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(",.0~%"),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width)/5)
    .data(hhPoverty.filter(d => d.group == selectGroup && d.variable == "Status quo"))
    .config(config)
}
```
```{ojs}
selectOutcome == "Haushaltseinkommen" ? barsIncome.render({renderer: "svg"}) : barsPoverty.render({renderer: "svg"})
```
:::
::::

:::: {.columns .column-body }
<button 
  class="btn btn-secondary" 
  type="button" 
  data-bs-toggle="collapse" 
  data-bs-target="#collapseContent6" 
  aria-expanded="false" 
  aria-controls="collapseContent6"
>
  Einfluss auf die Armustquote der Haushalte
</button>

::: {.panel .collapse #collapseContent6}
```{ojs}
changesIncome = {

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      size: 12,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("variable")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          labelLimit: 11111,
          labelExpr: "substring(datum.label, 9, 10)",
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labels: false,
        }),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format("+,.1~%"),
    )

  const rect = vl
    .markRect()
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("variable"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .legend(null)
        .scale({
          range: ["white", colors[1]],
        }),
      vl.stroke()
        .fieldN("selectMark")
        .scale({
          range: ["transparent", "black"]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      rect,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width)/2.1)
    .data(hhIncome.filter(d => d.group == selectGroup&& d.variable != "Status quo"))
    .config(config)
}
```
```{ojs}
changesPoverty = {

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      size: 12,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("variable")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          labelLimit: 11111,
          labelExpr: "substring(datum.label, 9, 10)",
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labels: false,
        }),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format("+,.1~f"),
    )

  const rect = vl
    .markRect()
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("variable"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .legend(null)
        .scale({
          range: [colors[1], "white", ],
        }),
      vl.stroke()
        .fieldN("selectMark")
        .scale({
          range: ["transparent", "black"]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      rect,
      text,    
      )
    .width(makeWidth(width)/2.1)
    .data(hhPoverty.filter(d => d.group == selectGroup&& d.variable != "Status quo"))
    .config(config)
}
```
```{ojs}
selectOutcome == "Haushaltseinkommen" ? changesIncome.render({renderer: "svg"}) : changesPoverty.render({renderer: "svg"})
```
:::
:::: -->


<script>
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
  let currentSlide = 0;

  // Function to handle slide transitions
  function showSlide(index) {
    // Hide the current slide with fade-out effect
    slides[currentSlide].classList.remove('fade-in');
    slides[currentSlide].classList.add('fade-out');
    
    // After fade-out, update to the new slide and show it with fade-in
    setTimeout(() => {
      slides[currentSlide].classList.remove('active');
      currentSlide = index;
      slides[currentSlide].classList.remove('fade-out');
      slides[currentSlide].classList.add('active', 'fade-in');
    }, 200); // Adjust timing to match the fade-out duration
  }

  // Attach event listeners to buttons
  document.getElementById('prevBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const newSlide = (currentSlide - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length;
    showSlide(newSlide);
  });

  document.getElementById('nextBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const newSlide = (currentSlide + 1) % slides.length;
    showSlide(newSlide);
  });

  // Initially show the first slide
  showSlide(currentSlide);
</script>
